titles.title: Til I Get to That Place

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Sometimes you may feel like You're going under And there seems to be no way out People may say that your God has left you Why do you still keep holding on But there's a course that is set before me I'm not giving up, I'm looking ahead You see I know I must keep on fighting I've come too far to turn back now.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I'll keep on pressing Til I get to that place To the mark of the high calling In Christ Jesus we'll stand still The road is narrow but I will still run for my prize Just to sit one day at His side When I get to that place

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: He never said that it would be easy But He gave me something to stand His Word still keeps holding me While living in this evil land and though the whole world is crumbling around me Just keep your eyes on the Prize So Lord take me, You completely fill me Lord, get me ready to take that flight

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I know sometimes it's not always easy But this Word is anointing us to stand Something still keeps on holding me While living in this evil place And though gross famine and darkness around you Lord, in this hour You promised You'll keep me All I need is Your sweet Holy Spirit I wanna be ready To take my flight with Thee

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Just one day All our trials will be over No more burdens to bear I hear Him say "Enter in. Well done! Well done!"
